---
title: "Resume"
format: html
---

# Melanie Maldonado

## Education
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science  
Brigham Young University–Idaho

## Skills
- Python
- Polars
- Data Analysis
- Machine Learning (basic)
- Web Development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)

## Projects
- DS 250 Data Projects
- Web-based game project using Phaser

## Experience
Worked on multiple data science and web development projects, focusing on data cleaning, visualization, and basic machine learning techniques

## Contact
Email: your-email@example.com
GitHub: https://github.com/melanie584
